# Daily Report — 2026-06-26

## Task Completed
Added `delete_change_schedule` tool (DELETE cmn_schedule/{sys_id}). Accepts a `schedule_id` as either a 32-char hex sys_id (passthrough) or an exact schedule name (resolved via GET before DELETE). Returns a 204/404 guard and clean error messages on network failures. Registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1842
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing vulnerabilities in setuptools, urllib3, and wheel — not introduced by this change.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py` — added `DeleteChangeScheduleParams` model and `delete_change_schedule` function

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imports and tool registry entry added
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `change_coordinator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_delete_change_schedule.py` — 13 new tests (success/204, success/200, name resolver, 404 guard, resolver errors, HTTP error, connection error, missing param, no instance_url, Pydantic model)

## Next Up
Add `list_change_schedule_spans` tool (GET cmn_schedule_span; spans within a schedule; filters for schedule_sys_id/day_of_week)
